initial_candidates.sql:
WITH school_ranks AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School,
        s.County,
        AVG(sa.AvgScrRead) AS avg_reading_score,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(sa.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS rank
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
    WHERE s.School LIKE '%Virtual%' 
    GROUP BY s.School, s.County
)
SELECT School
FROM school_ranks
WHERE rank <= 5;

WITH school_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School,
        s.County,
        AVG(sc.AvgScrRead) AS avg_reading_score
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
    GROUP BY s.School, s.County
),
ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        School,
        County,
        avg_reading_score,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY avg_reading_score DESC) AS rank_in_county
    FROM school_scores
)
SELECT 
    School
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank_in_county <= 5;

WITH school_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School,
        s.County,
        AVG(sa.AvgScrRead) AS avg_reading_score
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
    WHERE s.Charter = 'Y'
    GROUP BY s.School, s.County
),
ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        School,
        County,
        avg_reading_score,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY avg_reading_score DESC) AS rank_in_county
    FROM school_scores
)
SELECT School
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank_in_county <= 5;

WITH SchoolReadingScores AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School,
        s.County,
        AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
    WHERE s.County IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY s.School, s.County
),
RankedSchools AS (
    SELECT 
        School,
        County,
        AvgReadingScore,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY AvgReadingScore DESC) AS RankInCounty
    FROM SchoolReadingScores
)
SELECT School
FROM RankedSchools
WHERE RankInCounty <= 5;

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School,
        s.County,
        AVG(sa.AvgScrRead) AS avg_reading_score,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(sa.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS rank
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
    WHERE s.School LIKE '%Virtual%'
    GROUP BY s.School, s.County
)
SELECT School
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank <= 5;

        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(sa.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS rank
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
    WHERE s.School LIKE '%Virtual%'
    GROUP BY s.School, s.County
)
SELECT School
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank <= 5;
